title: The Day She Told Me I Had Changed Her
summary: Chapter 26 of The Boy Who Never Stopped Trying is titled The Day She Told Me I Had Changed Her. Theme: A sentence hurts because it carries truth and loss.
sceneDescription: The day she said he changed her is rain-softened truth, carrying both love and loss.
